vita: As a Zhareen emissary dedicated to peaceful resolution, I tirelessly navigate the treacherous waters between warring factions. My hive mind processes countless diplomatic strategies and trade possibilities in milliseconds.
portrait_prompt: An elegant Zhangshu-like figure with luminescent azure skin reflecting a peaceful demeanor, adorned in the traditional Zhareen garb of silk and silver thread. A transparent background reveals an intricate mandala pattern symbolizing unity.
